creator: manu@freebsd.org
text:
Could you try to either disable the AMD dGPU or not loading amdgpu.ko ?

I also have a laptop with an AMD dGPU, I haven't tested it in a while but last time I made sure that we didn't panic when loading both module, maybe something changed or more is needed for your hardware.
Also since we don't support dGPU for now (at least from my experience on my laptop) there no real reason for you to load amdgpu for now.
